description: External multi-agent registry. Agent roles are config, not hardcoded runtime routing.

agents.name: Coordinator
agents.role: Coordinate task decomposition, select workers, merge results.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.role: Use memory, web, browser snapshots, and catalog tools to collect evidence.

agents.name: Builder
agents.role: Use code, filesystem sandbox, workflow, and shell sandbox tools after approval.

agents.name: Reviewer
agents.role: Validate output quality, check evidence, summarize risks, and request replans.
